--- title: Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (stateDiagram-v2 approximation) for ZKP tooling comparison workflow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Define ZKP requirements
(curve support, proof systems,
performance, licensing)" as Define state "Shortlist ZKP libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate integration fit
(language bindings, audit history,
mobile support)" as Fit state "Run benchmarks
(proof size, time, memory)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and risks" as Document [*] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Fit: fits platform constraints Shortlist --> Reject: lacks required support Fit --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC targets Bench --> Shortlist: fails targets Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [*]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要一个ZKP工具选型的工作流图，用来指导团队评估零知识证明库。起点应该是明确定义需求，包括曲线支持、证明系统类型、性能要求和许可协议这些维度。
明白了，所以第一个状态是定义需求。接下来是不是进入候选库筛选阶段？还有，如果某些库不满足基本条件，应该有个拒绝或延后的分支吧？
对，Shortlist之后要评估集成适配度，主要看语言绑定、审计历史和移动端支持。如果平台约束不满足就走Reject分支，但拒绝后可以重新回到Shortlist再考虑其他候选。
好的，我先把定义需求、筛选、适配评估和拒绝这几个状态连起来。适配通过的话进入基准测试，测试证明大小、时间和内存消耗。
基准测试这里需要两个出口：达到PoC目标就进入Select状态，选定候选做概念验证；如果没达标要回到Shortlist重新筛选，而不是直接拒绝。
理解了，Bench到Select是正向路径，Bench回Shortlist是循环优化。Select之后应该是Document状态，记录决策依据和风险，然后结束整个流程。
等等，Reject的状态描述我想调整一下，用"Reject or defer candidate"更准确，因为有些库可能只是暂时不适合，未来可以重新评估。
已更新，状态名改为"Reject or defer candidate"。整个流程从初始状态进入Define，最终从Document回到终止状态，所有分支和循环都清晰了。
